summary: Completed iteration 12 testing for skills provisioning pipeline rewrite and genesis prompt security hardening. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend AnimaVM page verified with 6-step provisioning stepper and 7 monitor tabs. Key changes verified: 1) Skills now push to ~/.openclaw/skills/ (no .anima/skills references in agent_setup.py), 2) genesis-prompt.md contains SKILL DISCOVERY section with npx clawhub commands and openclaw skills list, 3) Security section includes ClawHavoc warning, skill-vetter recommendation, and 'NEVER attempt to connect to localhost' warning. No localhost/127.0.0.1 references outside security warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: Skills path correctly changed from ~/.anima/skills/ to ~/.openclaw/skills/ in all locations in agent_setup.py
load-skills endpoint now creates ~/.openclaw/skills-manifest.json inside sandbox with discovery commands
deploy-agent endpoint also pushes skills to ~/.openclaw/skills/ path
genesis-prompt.md SKILL DISCOVERY section (lines 271-310) contains comprehensive skill management instructions
npx clawhub commands for search/install/list/update correctly documented
openclaw skills list command documented for discovering loaded skills
ClawHavoc security warning mentions 340+ malicious skills incident
skill-vetter recommendation for auditing suspicious skills
SECURITY section line 346 contains 'NEVER attempt to connect to localhost' warning
No localhost/127.0.0.1 references outside security context

success_rate.frontend: 100% (AnimaVM page loads with 6 stepper steps and 7 monitor tabs)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 tested skills provisioning pipeline rewrite and genesis prompt security hardening. All tests pass. Key verified changes: 1) agent_setup.py uses ~/.openclaw/skills/ path everywhere (no .anima/skills references), 2) load-skills endpoint runs 'npx clawhub@latest install' inside sandbox and writes skills-manifest.json, 3) genesis-prompt.md has SKILL DISCOVERY section with clawhub/openclaw commands, 4) Security section hardened with localhost warning and skill-vetter recommendation.
